examples: A minivan drove by, five faces peering at the window.
I could set something up so that she could exercise the privilege of driving only between home and school, and only in the minivan (not the sport sedan).
For me, a mid-life crisis is a red minivan.
With no minivan blocking your garage, you have room for that Corvette convertible.
' Settler Yanon Netonel(ph) stopped his minivan to pick up one of the hitchhikers.
